seo_text:
About the Project

Cash Clash is an interactive tool designed to visualize and compare the scale of financial flows in real time. Using automated calculations based on planned budgets and annual performance data, the platform demonstrates the dynamics of capital accumulation by major companies, organizations, and public figures, turning complex statistics into clear visual comparisons.

All calculations are based on open-source data and various types of financial reporting. Since the budget structures of government agencies, corporations, and individuals differ significantly, any direct comparison between them is symbolic, intended for informational and entertainment purposes only, and does not constitute financial advice.
